calendar.matters:
MOTION TO STRIKE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's MOTION TO STRIKE CLIAM OF TREVOR MERZ.

The People's motion to strike the claim of Trevor Merz is denied. Mr. Merz timely filed a claim opposing forfeiture bearing an electronic verification. Even if that verification was technically deficient, the failure to verify a pleading-even where the verification is required by statute-is a mere defect curable by amendment, even when submitted after the statute of limitations has run on the time to file the pleading. (United Farm Workers of America v. ALRB (1984) 37 Cal.3d 912, 915; Board of Trustees v. Superior Court (2007) 149 Cal.App.4th 1154, 1163-64.) In accordance with California's strong policies favoring liberal amendment of pleadings and resolution of disputes on their merits, Mr. Merz's claim opposing forfeiture is deemed timely filed on November 9, 2018.

A proposed order is submitted by email.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
